title: Skyblock MC
description: This is an modpack is designed for Hypixel skyblock and includes skyblock mods and Quality of life features!
body:
# Skyblock MC
## What is Skyblock MC?
**Skyblock MC** is an Modpack that is designed for **Hypixel Skyblock** and includes **skyblock mods** and **quality of life mods** and **FurfSky Reborn** resource pack (an hypixel skyblock texture pack that includes skyblock textures!).

Skyblock MC is intended for the Skyblock game mode on hypixel.net

**Skyblock MC** has **more features** than **Badlion client** in **Hypixel Skyblock** and has **performance mods** so it **improves performance** and **network handeling!**
## How can I install Skyblock MC?

You can **install any modpack** in **modrinth** using **modrinth launcher.**
## Features of Skyblock MC

1. **Skyblock mods** that **improves Quality of Life** in Skyblock (Includes [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) a Neu inspired mod, [Skyhanni](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyhanni) with many unique features for Hypixel SkyBlock. And many more skyblock mods)
2. **Peformance mods** ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) that improves your experience on large multiplayer servers. And many more!)
3. **Skyblock resource pack!** ([FurfSky Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn) it is the only resource pack avalible, cause the other packs are not up to date.)
